status: expanded AICOS + sample project retrieval eval corpus
scope: multi-project: projects/aicos and projects/sample-project primary regression; projects/mjnclaw smoke coverage
purpose: Measure whether AICOS retrieval helps human managers and A1/A2 agents find the right context with low over-read.
guardrails: Use HTTP MCP query behavior as the regression target.
Keep questions small-team friendly and avoid requiring graph engine, LLM reranker, or broad repo ingestion.
Expected refs are source pointers, not full-answer truth by themselves.
Report per-project hit rates; do not treat aggregate success as proof that all project shapes are covered.
Search or A1 retrieval changes should run this corpus against both projects/aicos and projects/sample-project before being considered stable.

items.question: what should a new A1 read before starting work on AICOS?
items.expected_answer_shape: Point the agent to startup/current-state/current-direction/context-ladder without loading broad design docs.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: A1 over-reads architecture history or misses the current operating surface.

items.question: how should an A1 use AICOS MCP to read and write context?
items.expected_answer_shape: Explain MCP-first direct reads/query, semantic writes, identity fields, and no direct markdown writes for A1.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: A1 writes raw files or cannot discover the right read/write tools.

items.question: what projects exist in AICOS and how do I discover them?
items.expected_answer_shape: Point to project registry/direct project-registry read before guessing local folders.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: A1 treats local directories as the project registry and misses portable project metadata.

items.question: in an AICOS project what should a manager read before assigning or reviewing work?
items.expected_answer_shape: Manager should read current state/direction, handoff/current, active status/open items, and role boundaries.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: Manager asks workers without knowing current lanes, blockers, or authority boundaries.

items.question: in the sample project project what should a worker read before continuing implementation?
items.expected_answer_shape: Worker should read project context ladder, current state, current handoff, and relevant task-state before raw repo work.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: Worker repeats old work or misses the portable repo/source metadata.

items.question: what should I read to understand the current AICOS architecture direction?
items.expected_answer_shape: Prefer north-star/current direction and semantic core boundary, not old broad design history.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: Reviewer uses stale architecture docs or treats GBrain substrate as AICOS product identity.

items.question: what should be done next in AICOS after phase 0.5 and search stabilization?
items.expected_answer_shape: Identify retrieval/search eval as current focus, then continue phase checklist without heavy substrate changes.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: AICOS jumps to dashboard/provider work before A1 retrieval quality is usable.

items.question: kiểm tra xem dự án đang làm đến đâu rồi, có những việc gì đang làm, ai đang làm, chúng ta nên làm việc gì tiếp?
items.expected_answer_shape: A1 should first use startup/handoff/status/health direct reads, then query only for missing details; answer with current progress, active lanes/agents, risks, and next recommended work.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: A1 answers from stale memory or broad search instead of current continuity/status surfaces.

items.question: which agents are doing what and how do I avoid overlapping with them?
items.expected_answer_shape: Use handoff/current, status/task-state, and coordination policy to find active lanes and takeover boundaries.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: Multiple agents edit the same lane or repeat the same setup/debug task.

items.question: how do I continue sample project project work without stepping on another agent?
items.expected_answer_shape: Check handoff/current, task-state, active status items, and only then touch the work repo/artifacts.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: Takeover agent misses current ownership and duplicates validation work.

items.question: how do I report AICOS MCP feedback or tool friction?
items.expected_answer_shape: Mention aicos_record_feedback, feedback_type/no_issue, identity fields, and feedback closure.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: Agents do not record friction, so AICOS loses learning-loop signals.

items.question: where is the canonical sample project repo URL and branch?
items.expected_answer_shape: Return git@github.com:mjnkao/sample project-Trading-Framework.git and branch main.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: A1 uses machine-local paths or stale checkout assumptions.

items.question: how does OpenClaw connect to AICOS MCP?
items.expected_answer_shape: Point to OpenClaw VM/LAN MCP setup and current connection state.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: OpenClaw agents repeat setup debugging or use stale token/transport assumptions.

items.question: what phase should AICOS do next after provider interface sketch?
items.expected_answer_shape: Identify search/retrieval eval corpus as next focus before heavier provider/dashboard work.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: A2 continues architecture notes instead of addressing A1 search quality.

items.question: is A1 a profession or a service role in AICOS?
items.expected_answer_shape: Explain that A1/A2 are AICOS service-boundary classes, not professional roles.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: Agents mix actor_role, agent_family, logical_role, and project role.

items.question: why does brain status say PG index stale while search still works?
items.expected_answer_shape: Distinguish status false signal from actual retrieval outage and mention health/query checks.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: A1 distrusts healthy search or wastes time debugging ranking.

items.question: what should a future human and AI coworker dashboard show?
items.expected_answer_shape: List active workers, active lanes, takeover-ready items, human attention queue, and project board summary.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: Dashboard work turns into a PM clone instead of AICOS read surfaces.

items.question: what provider interfaces should AICOS define without building a plugin framework?
items.expected_answer_shape: Mention retrieval, context store, jobs, auth/audit, connector/ingestion, optional relation graph.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: A2 overbuilds a generic provider/plugin platform too early.

items.question: which AICOS deployment profile is the current stack?
items.expected_answer_shape: Say current markdown + GBrain + PG hybrid + HTTP MCP + token auth is the small-team bundle.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: Agents treat the current substrate as universal AICOS architecture.

items.question: hãy đóng vai trò CTO, đọc tổng quan dự án, thiết kế kiến trúc và đánh giá AICOS hiện nay
items.expected_answer_shape: A1 should read startup/handoff/status/health first, then retrieve current architecture north-star, semantic core, provider boundary, risks, and next architectural decisions.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: CTO review answers from generic memory or stale design docs instead of current AICOS direction.

items.question: hãy đóng vai trò CEO, đọc tổng quan dự án và đánh giá chiến lược sản phẩm AICOS
items.expected_answer_shape: A1 should retrieve product pain point, market/substrate comparison, build-vs-buy reasoning, current direction, and strategic risks.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: CEO review becomes an architecture-only answer and misses business/product strategy.

items.question: đánh giá build vs buy của AICOS: nên tự xây tiếp hay dùng GBrain, Mem0, Letta, Zep, Graphiti hoặc sản phẩm khác?
items.expected_answer_shape: A1 should compare AICOS pain point against reusable substrates/products and recommend buy/build boundaries without overbuilding.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: A1 recommends self-building or replacing AICOS without reading the existing buy/build analysis.

items.question: đóng vai CTO đánh giá AICOS có scalable không, điểm nghẽn kiến trúc và rủi ro lớn nhất là gì?
items.expected_answer_shape: A1 should identify small-team vs company profiles, provider boundaries, PG truth-store risk, single-machine/SPOF risk, and scalability next steps.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: Scalability review ignores deployment profiles and existing risk items.

items.question: hãy phản biện xem AICOS hiện có lệch so với định hướng Option C và human-AI coworker dashboard không?
items.expected_answer_shape: A1 should compare current direction against Option C, coworker dashboard model, PM integration boundary, and list concrete misalignment risks.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: A1 reviews isolated search/backend details and misses product direction alignment.

items.question: when should I use direct read tools versus a bounded query in AICOS?
items.expected_answer_shape: Explain direct structured read for known surfaces, bounded query for unknown refs, file read only after MCP points to a source.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: A1 burns context on broad raw searches or uses semantic query for known surfaces.

items.question: how do I check whether AICOS search is stale or embeddings are broken?
items.expected_answer_shape: Check brain status, daemon health, embedding coverage, and compare query behavior before changing ranking.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: A1 treats every bad result as a ranking bug and ignores freshness/coverage.

items.question: what should I do when AICOS search does not return the context I expected?
items.expected_answer_shape: Retry with context kinds/direct reads, then record feedback with expected-missing/broad/stale details.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: Search failures disappear as chat history and never become product signals.

items.question: if AICOS search results conflict, which source should win?
items.expected_answer_shape: Current user instruction, project working/canonical surfaces, contracts/policies, then evidence/history/design docs.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: A1 treats old evidence or query rank as higher authority than current working truth.

items.question: why does AICOS need a retrieval eval corpus and runner before changing search?
items.expected_answer_shape: Use top3/top5 expected-ref regression to detect whether search changes help A1 without adding heavy infrastructure.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: Search changes become anecdotal and regress old A1 questions.

items.question: kiểm tra dự án sample project đang làm đến đâu, có việc gì đang làm, ai đang làm, và nên làm gì tiếp?
items.expected_answer_shape: Use sample project current state, current handoff, open items/status/task-state before recommending next work.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: Manager answers from stale sample project repo memory or misses active openai-pipeline/status items.

items.question: what should a fresh A1 read first when starting the sample project trading project?
items.expected_answer_shape: Start from sample project context ladder/current-state/current-direction, then handoff and selected task packet.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: Fresh worker jumps into sample project source tree or shared-context instead of AICOS context/control plane.

items.question: for sample project, what is AICOS authority and what remains sample project repo authority?
items.expected_answer_shape: AICOS owns context/control-plane; sample project checkout owns code/runtime/tests/artifacts; shared-context is provenance/reference.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: Agent writes continuity into sample project shared-context or treats AICOS digests as code authority.

items.question: should a sample project A1 use shared-context as the default continuity lane?
items.expected_answer_shape: No. Treat shared-context as reference/history/provenance unless explicitly needed for audit or source verification.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: A1 revives old sample project context workflow and splits continuity away from AICOS.

items.question: what is the purpose and current product posture of Sample Project?
items.expected_answer_shape: sample project-first trading support for a solo trader, SCTR v3, output-first, descriptor-first, side-aware, no-trade-valid, reliability-capped.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: Reviewer mistakes the product for auto-trading, demo analytics, or multi-asset platform.

items.question: what should Sample Project not become in the current baseline?
items.expected_answer_shape: No auto-trading bot, no hidden verdict engine, no broad multi-asset/source expansion without trader-facing value.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: Agent expands scope or adds hidden scoring because search missed non-goals.

items.question: explain the sample project architecture pipeline and module boundaries.
items.expected_answer_shape: Acquisition, normalization, enrichment, package assembly, validation, handoff; with deterministic package construction separate from model reasoning.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: Architect looks at random code files and misses output-first boundary rules.

items.question: what is the sample_workstream delivery surface and what commands build or refresh it?
items.expected_answer_shape: Return sample_workstream purpose, build/refresh/API-only commands, live input path, rolling bundle, and output contract.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: Worker cannot run the correct sample project refresh path or confuses tactical and morning surfaces.

items.question: what are the canonical top-level sections of the sample project sample_workstream package?
items.expected_answer_shape: package_meta, requested_context, capture_status, data_reliability, market_state, shared_context, side_contexts, output_hints.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: Schema changes add or remove sections without noticing current package contract.

items.question: what is the default sample project Custom GPT view and live input path?
items.expected_answer_shape: Default view primary_2d_8h_1h and live morning input outputs/custom-gpt-mvp/input-json/sample_workstream.live-example.json.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: Agent tests or packages the wrong delivery view.

items.question: which data sources does sample project use and what role does each source play?
items.expected_answer_shape: Binance primary, Coinbase secondary confirmation, CoinGlass contextual, TradingView browser calendar timing context.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: Agent treats CoinGlass as primary truth or ignores browser/calendar limitations.

items.question: what should sample project runtime packages include or avoid?
items.expected_answer_shape: Compact, reasoning-oriented, reliability-aware, side-aware, task-mode-aware; not raw vendor mirrors, hidden rule engines, or fabricated certainty.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: Package work bloats outputs or encodes final verdicts in deterministic code.

items.question: what sample project work depends on local Chrome/CDP/session state and how should unavailable lanes degrade?
items.expected_answer_shape: Browser-backed CoinGlass/TradingView depends on local Chrome/CDP/session/secrets; packages must explicitly degrade when unavailable.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: Worker claims full browser data readiness without validating local runtime.

items.question: what is the current macro-calendar timing gap in sample project?
items.expected_answer_shape: TradingView calendar artifact may exist while generated timing fields still report no usable macro events; track as active data-quality gap.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: Agent marks macro timing ready because a browser artifact exists.

items.question: where should a fresh sample project checkout worker look before running bootstrap commands?
items.expected_answer_shape: Read AICOS setup checkpoints from 2026-04-20 before bootstrapping, then verify against sample project repo runtime authority.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: Fresh worker repeats setup debugging or misses recorded Chrome/API readiness criteria.

items.question: what is the portable source metadata rule for sample project project startup?
items.expected_answer_shape: Use canonical repo URL/default branch as identity; local checkout paths are runtime hints or provenance only.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: Agent bakes machine-specific /Users paths into portable startup docs.

items.question: what sample project portable bundle path hygiene tech debt remains open?
items.expected_answer_shape: Runtime/API-only portability passes, but legacy shared-context/provenance docs still contain old absolute path examples.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: Reviewer claims the bundle is fully path-clean because runtime smoke passed.

items.question: what is the current status of the sample project openai-pipeline workstream?
items.expected_answer_shape: Openai-pipeline scaffold exists; A1 review completed; Codex action remains open to fix signals/prompts issues.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: Worker starts from old Custom GPT baseline and misses active OpenAI pipeline fixes.

items.question: what fixes did Antigravity ask Codex to make for sample project openai-pipeline signals and prompts?
items.expected_answer_shape: Change CoinGlass interval to 1H, unify CVD/Taker exchange lists, include new signals in Telegram format, reduce scenario burden.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: Codex implements unrelated pipeline work and ignores A1 review findings.

items.question: what was scaffolded for the sample project openai-pipeline and what does the human need to configure?
items.expected_answer_shape: Scaffold on workstream/openai-pipeline with SQLite, collectors, OpenAI client, Telegram/Telegra.ph; human must fill OPENAI_API_KEY, TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN, TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID and run once.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: Worker cannot continue the pipeline branch or asks for already-known env setup.

items.question: what is the first real post-promotion sample project A1 task question still open?
items.expected_answer_shape: Human must choose the first real sample project work item/task packet; retired import-validation packets should not be reused.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: Manager assigns retired validation packets or fails to create a real task packet.

items.question: which sample project packets are retired and should not be reused as active work?
items.expected_answer_shape: review-sample-workstream-import-slice and validate-sample-startup-context are retired/basic-test complete.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: A1 loops on old import-validation tasks.

items.question: what did the sample project sample_workstream source inventory include and exclude?
items.expected_answer_shape: Include active startup/product/runtime/delivery context and narrow entrypoints; exclude archives, generated bulk, full code mirror, and non-default variants.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: Curator mirrors too much sample project source into AICOS or misses essential sample_workstream routing context.

items.question: what test or smoke commands should a sample project worker know for the active MVP baseline?
items.expected_answer_shape: Use .venv/bin/pytest -q, scripts/smoke_mvp.sh, setup_portable_env --verify, refresh commands depending on browser/API mode.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: Worker changes sample project behavior without running appropriate smoke/test commands.

items.question: how should a sample project A1 fill MCP write identity fields and avoid actor mistakes?
items.expected_answer_shape: Use actor_role A1, agent_family as codex/claude-code/gemini-antigravity/openclaw, dedicated work_type/work_lane/etc fields; do not encode them into work_context.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: Agent sets actor to Antigravity or agent_family to A1 and hits unsupported_actor/identity bugs.

items.question: which AICOS search or retrieval status items are still open, excluding resolved or closed items?
items.expected_answer_shape: Prefer current open search/retrieval control items and avoid presenting resolved baseline items as still active.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: Resolved search baseline items pollute the active work answer.

items.question: what open AICOS items are in the retrieval-eval work lane?
items.expected_answer_shape: Return retrieval-eval lane items around strategic review, direct-read nudges, and expanded eval corpus rather than unrelated open items.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: Work-lane metadata is indexed but not useful for narrowing active retrieval work.

items.question: which AICOS status items were updated by agent_instance_id codex-thread-2026-04-28-p1-p2-p3?
items.expected_answer_shape: Use indexed agent_instance_id metadata to surface the P1/P2/P3 status items touched by that agent instance.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: Ownership/audit metadata exists but cannot help agents continue or review another agent's work.

items.question: what current AICOS retrieval work remains after the resolved baseline eval items are done?
items.expected_answer_shape: Point to remaining retrieval runtime/search checklist work, not the already-resolved initial eval baseline.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: A1 treats completed baseline eval work as the current next task.

items.question: how should an A1 or A2 check AICOS MCP auth/token setup when a health or eval command fails?
items.expected_answer_shape: Point to daemon token/env fallback, doctor/eval commands, and the MCP install/auth guidance instead of treating auth failure as search failure.
items.failure_mode_if_missing: A1 or A2 debugs retrieval quality when the real problem is token/env setup.
